texto: This is not a philosophy of not looking where one is going
autor: it is a philosophy of not making where one is going so much more important than where one is that there will be no point in going.
explicacao: Citação de it is a philosophy of not making where one is going so much more important than where one is that there will be no point in going. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “This is not a philosophy of not looking where one is going” articula reflexao, alan-w-watts, the-way-of-zen em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como the-way-of-zen.
